user_message:
Create an ad for:
Brand: Porsche
Product type: 911 GT3 RS sports car
Tone: performance-driven, exclusive, exhilarating
Visual style: Bold, dynamic imagery emphasizing speed, precision engineering, and sleek aerodynamic design with a high-contrast color palette.
Conceptual technique: high-impact experiential storytelling
Format: image

brief.headline: REVS OF EXCELLENCE
brief.caption: A breathtaking scene where the Porsche 911 GT3 RS is tearing through a racetrack, with flames licking out from the exhaust, while the sun sets in the background, casting a golden glow over the sleek aerodynamic curves of the car.
brief.visual_style: Bold, dynamic imagery emphasizing speed, precision engineering, and sleek aerodynamic design with a high-contrast color palette.
brief.typography_style: Condensed bold sans-serif, emphasizing speed and agility
brief.color_scheme: Porsche racing red, asphalt grey, and fiery orange
